title: Academic Course Prerequisites
content:
Course Prerequisites - Computer Science Department
Morgan State University

---

INTRODUCTORY COURSES

COSC 111 - Introduction to Computer Science I
Credits: 4 | Prerequisite: None | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 112 - Introduction to Computer Science II
Credits: 4 | Prerequisite: COSC 111 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

---

200-LEVEL COURSES

COSC 201 - Computer Ethics
Credits: 1 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 220 - Data Structures and Algorithms
Credits: 4 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 238 - Object-Oriented Programming
Credits: 4 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 239 - Java Programming
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 241 - Computer Systems and Digital Logic
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 and MATH 241 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 243 - Computer Architecture
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 241 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 251 - Introduction to Data Science
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 281 - Discrete Structures
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

CLCO 261 - Introduction to Cloud Computing
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

---

300-LEVEL COURSES

COSC 301 - Web Technologies
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 320 - Algorithm Design and Analysis
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 323 - Introduction to Cryptography
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 332 - Introduction to Game Design and Development
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 338 - Mobile App Design and Development
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 349 - Computer Networks
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 351 - Cybersecurity
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 352 - Organization of Programming Languages
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 354 - Operating Systems
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 and COSC 241 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 383 - Numerical Methods and Programming
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 385 - Theory of Languages and Automata
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 281 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 386 - Introduction to Quantum Computing
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 281 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

---

400-LEVEL COURSES

CLCO 401 - Cloud Applications
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: CLCO 261 (C or higher) | Offered: As needed

CLCO 471 - Data Analytics in Cloud
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: CLCO 261 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 458 - Software Engineering
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 459 - Database Design
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 460 - Computer Graphics
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: As needed

COSC 470 - Artificial Intelligence
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 472 - Introduction to Machine Learning
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 112 (C or higher), MATH 312 (C or higher) | Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 480 - Introduction to Image Processing and Analysis
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 220 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 486 - Applied Quantum Computing
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: COSC 386 (C or higher) | Offered: As offered

COSC 490 - Senior Project
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: Department chair permission, senior standing | Offered: As needed

COSC 491 - Conference Course
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: Department permission | Offered: As needed

COSC 498 - Senior Internship
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: Senior standing, department permission | Offered: As needed

COSC 499 - Senior Research or Teaching/Tutorial Assistantship
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: Senior standing, department permission | Offered: As needed

CLCO 490 - Senior Project in Cloud Computing
Credits: 3 | Prerequisite: Department chair permission, senior standing | Offered: As needed

---

IMPORTANT NOTES
- All prerequisites require a grade of "C" or higher unless otherwise specified
- Departmental permission may be required for some courses
- Course offerings may vary by semester - check with advisor
- Some courses may have co-requisites in addition to prerequisites
- COSC 301 (Web Technologies) is not listed as a degree requirement but may be offered as an additional elective
